description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push to main and on pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, pypy-3.8). The workflow should check out the repository code, perform base setup, install dependencies, list installed packages, check the manifest, and run tests with coverage on Linux and macOS, and run tests without coverage on Windows and PyPy.
